text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With Ardan's next race fast<n>approaching, she and I are
spending<n>our days training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My time went down, didn't it? My<n>breathing doesn't feel as
ragged as<n>before either.
choice_data_list:
Yeah, you're flying through this regimen! Good
job!

Yeah, you're flying through this regimen! Good
job!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Now then... I shall get back<n>to practice.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
When Ardan's in practice mode,<n>nothing can shake her out
of it, not<n>even praise.
choice_data_list:
That focus of yours is your strongest weapon. |
That focus of yours is your strongest weapon.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
A... weapon?Ah, my apologies. I<n>appreciate the
compliment—I've just<n>never thought about it like that before.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems she's unaware of the<n>effects her determination
has had on<n>her and her training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As I'm sure you know, I was born<n>with a fragile, weak
body.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I do not know when my body will give<n>out on me. Among
the countless<n>Umamusume who shine so bright, my<n>star
may very well burn out the<n>fastest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Just like that painting in the woods, I<n>may fade away and be
forgotten. And<n>yet, here and now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I still wish to shine, and I'm willing to<n>do whatever it takes
to do so.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Even as she spoke about her own<n>circumstances, Mejiro
Ardan's eyes<n>burned with a quiet... yet firm<n>determination.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I'm ready, Trainer. Please time my<n>last lap.

text_block_list.name: Observing Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Huh? How many laps does that<n>make?She's doing a lot of<n>
exercises... Will she be okay?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I can hear the voice of Ardan's<n>anxious juniors. However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... So far, so good...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Is everything all right?
choice_data_list:
I was just wondering if we should add another
lap or two.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I... I would love that, actually. I was<n>just thinking that I
wanted to run a<n>little more.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for today. I feel like<n>today's training was
especially<n>fruitful.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
In addition, I was wondering...<n>Perhaps we could use
today's<n>increased practice regimen going<n>forward?
choice_data_list: I was just about to ask.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Ehehe, I should be grateful.<n>As I am now, I don't
have to worry<n>about overheating anymore.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Before my debut, there were times<n>where I could not
practice for days at<n>a time. I'm glad to know that's all in<n>
the past now.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With that, our post-training meeting<n>ends on an optimistic
note. Yet despite<n>the fact that the day's over, Ardan's<n>
posture remains as composed as<n>ever.
choice_data_list:
You can relax a bit more during your breaks, you
know.

You can relax a bit more during your breaks, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?
choice_data_list:
You could take a seat or even take a nap on the
sofa.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you, but I feel more at ease<n>like this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Racers in the Mejiro family make a<n>lot of public
appearances, so we're<n>taught how to conduct ourselves
from<n>a very young age. And, well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Family Friend
text_block_list.text:
Ardan? Why are you over here, all by<n>your lonesome?
You're leaning<n>against the wall... Are you feeling<n>sick?

text_block_list.name: Young Ardan
text_block_list.text: No, ma'am. I was just thinking to<n>myself...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Family Friend
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, don't push yourself. You<n>have to be mindful of
your health!

text_block_list.name: Young Ardan
text_block_list.text: (Oh... If I relax too much, others will<n>think I'm sick...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, my apologies. In any case, I feel<n>more relaxed like this,
so you needn't<n>worry.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I promised you I wouldn't<n>overdo it, correct? I
assure you, I am<n>fine.
choice_data_list:
All right, but remember, it's okay to do what you
want sometimes.

All right, but remember, it's okay to do what you
want sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear... I don't know if spoiling me<n>like that is such a good
idea, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps tomorrow I will skip practice<n>simply because I feel
like it. What will<n>you do then?
choice_data_list:
I-I'm not going to go easy on you in terms of
training!

I-I'm not going to go easy on you in terms of
training!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... And that's exactly what I'm<n>hoping for. But thank
you for your<n>concern. I promise I'm fine.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As she smiles, I feel my own desire<n>to further protest melt
away. It seems<n>even I am no match for Mejiro<n>Ardan's
stubborn determination.
